body:
https://chatgpt.com/share/6a3825b9-8de4-83ee-9c24-52fd1eb38d24

We need to make sure we add automated dialog recreation, that will test our system for ability to answer correctly.

For example we need to add automated script for conversion of `https://chatgpt.com/share/6a3825b9-8de4-83ee-9c24-52fd1eb38d24` into our demo format, so we will be able to fully support replay of that dialog. And we can use that replay as test for our system, it should be able to answer not worse than ChatGPT did answer in that case.

When user asks to answer with single line, from all possible solutions we might find or generate we should select simpliest, shortest, yet human readable. For example we should not compromise whitespace for shortness.

We also need to be able to find similar links (crawl them on any target website), for example we can search similar links using GitHub regexp search, take 100 of them, and out 100, find 10 shortest, and ensure our system is able to solve them all by thinking, generalizing, not memoizing or specializing.

Anyway after this pull request, we should preserve all our tools, so next time we will encounter ChatGPT share links as example we will be ready to improve our system by generalizing our meta algorithm to be able to solve also that new provided case without specifically memoizing it.

We should also do the same for https://share.google/aimode/VG0HhpnAXrBkC0QgP and 

We also need to support same features for markdown and other formats in https://github.com/link-assistant/web-capture feature, but we also need to make sure web-capture is able to produce as close to the source description of these links in https://github.com/link-foundation/meta-language as possible.

So we should ask web-capture to add support for meta-language as a basis for parsed documents base object model, along size source HTML, so we can use all the details in Rust model.

So the first stage of this issue is deep analysis, and reporting of issues to our dependencies, that we develop, once our dependencies are enriched, we will use their latest versions, to fully support all these features ourselves. So the pull request will be placed on pause once all issues are reported using gh tool.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Automated testing scripts/CLI commands
